title: Into the Wild: A Day Trip Along Immokalee Road
excerpt: From ancient cypress forests to farm-fresh flavors, Immokalee Road is one of Southwest Florida's most rewarding — and least-crowded — day-trip drives.
igCaption:
Into the Wild: A Day Trip Along Immokalee Road

From ancient cypress forests to farm-fresh flavors, Immokalee Road is one of Southwest Florida's most rewarding — and least-crowded — day-trip drives.
